description: You are an election administrator converting an empty community hall into a civic polling station. Create an organized layout with 4 functional zones (Queue/Entrance, Registration, Voting Area, and Ballot Scanning). Apply distinct floor colors or textures to at least 2 of these zones to separate the secure areas. Draw at least 6 interior partition walls to act as privacy dividers between voting booths. Furnish the space with at least 12 total desks, tables, or cabinets and at least 12 total chairs or benches. Place at least 4 text labels on the floor plan to guide voter flow (e.g., 'Entrance', 'Check-in', 'Voting Booths'). Add at least 1 dimension line to verify the main aisle or accessible booth width. Save the updated layout to its original file location.
